title: Show HN: zkGolf – Competitive optimization of formally verified circuits
summary: zkGolf是一个通过LLM自动生成并优化零知识证明电路的竞赛平台，已实现超越人工优化的SHA256电路。
translated_summary: zkGolf is an open competition for producing optimized, formally verified zero-knowledge circuits using LLMs, achieving a SHA256 circuit that beats the human-optimized state of the art.
